Description: Cart page loads with product in cart
Preconditions: Guest user; in-stock product added to cart
Steps: 1. Navigate to /cart
Expected Result: Page heading visible; at least one product row present; no broken layout.

Description: Checkout CTA navigates to /checkout
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Click Checkout CTA
Expected Result: URL changes to /checkout or matches checkout URL pattern.

Description: Increasing item quantity updates line total and subtotal
Preconditions: Cart has 1 product at qty 1; stock available
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Note line price and subtotal 3. Increase qty by 1 4. Read new line total and subtotal
Expected Result: Line total = price × new qty; subtotal increases accordingly.

Description: Decreasing item quantity (from 2 to 1) updates line total and subtotal
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Note line price and subtotal 3. Decrease qty by 1 4. Read new line total and subtotal
Expected Result: Line total = price × new qty; subtotal decreases accordingly.
Notes: Setup: add product and set qty to 2 before this step

Description: Removing a product from cart deletes the row and updates subtotal
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Click Remove on a product 3. Observe cart
Expected Result: Product row disappears; subtotal updates; header cart count decrements.

Description: Cart subtotal equals sum of (item price × qty) across all line items
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Read each line: price × qty 3. Sum them 4. Compare to displayed subtotal
Expected Result: Displayed subtotal matches computed sum (within rounding tolerance).

Description: Empty cart shows empty-state message and continue shopping CTA
Steps: 1. Navigate to /cart
Expected Result: Empty-state message visible; no product rows present; continue shopping CTA visible.

Description: Cart product row shows image + name + variant + price
Preconditions: Cart has a configurable product with size and colour selected
Steps: 1. Add configurable product with size and colour from PDP 2. Navigate to /cart 3. Inspect product row
Expected Result: Product image, name, selected size, selected colour, and price all visible and non-empty.

Description: Removing the last item in cart shows empty state
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Click Remove on the product
Expected Result: Empty state displayed; header cart count becomes 0.

Description: Removing one item from multi-item cart leaves other items intact
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Note all product names 3. Remove one product 4. Inspect remaining rows
Expected Result: Only the removed product disappears; other items unchanged; subtotal updates.
Notes: Requires ATC of 2 products in setup

Description: Checkout CTA is blocked or shows error when cart contains OOS item
Preconditions: Cart contains out-of-stock or unavailable product
Steps: 1. Open /cart with OOS product 2. Attempt to click Checkout
Expected Result: Checkout is blocked; OOS or error message visible; user cannot proceed.
Notes: @data-dependent — OOS product may not be reliably reproduced in staging

Description: Header cart icon count matches total quantity of items in cart
Preconditions: Cart has product(s) with known quantities
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Read header cart icon count 3. Compare with sum of item quantities
Expected Result: Header count equals sum of all item quantities in cart.

Description: Applying a valid coupon code shows discount line and reduces cart total
Preconditions: Valid coupon code in test data; cart has eligible product
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Enter valid coupon code 3. Click Apply
Expected Result: Discount line appears in totals; cart total decreases by coupon value.
Notes: @data-dependent — coupon may expire or be environment-specific

Description: Entering an invalid coupon code shows error message and leaves totals unchanged
Preconditions: Cart has product; coupon input visible
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Enter invalid code (e.g. INVALID-9999) 3. Click Apply
Expected Result: Error message visible; cart totals unchanged.

Description: Qty cannot be decreased below 1; product removal or qty block is triggered
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Click decrease qty button
Expected Result: Either remove confirmation appears OR product is removed OR qty stays at 1.
Notes: Behaviour varies by brand: some auto-remove; some block; some confirm

Description: Sale product shows original price and discounted price in cart row
Steps: 1. Add sale product 2. Open /cart 3. Inspect product row
Expected Result: Both original (struck-through) and sale price visible in product row.
Notes: @data-dependent — sale product may not be available at all times

Description: Cart is functional on mobile viewport and checkout CTA is accessible
Steps: 1. Open /cart on mobile viewport 2. Scroll if needed 3. Locate checkout CTA
Expected Result: CTA visible; tapping navigates to /checkout.

Description: Coupon/promo code input field is visible on the cart page
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Locate coupon/promo code field
Expected Result: Coupon input field and Apply button visible.

Description: Clicking product name or image in cart navigates to the product's PDP
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Click product image or name
Expected Result: URL changes to the product's PDP path.

Description: Guest cart contents persist after page refresh
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Note items 3. Refresh page 4. Check cart contents
Expected Result: Same products remain in cart after refresh.

Description: Guest cart contents persist after navigating away and returning
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Navigate to homepage 3. Navigate back to /cart
Expected Result: Cart contents unchanged.

Description: Afterpay payment messaging is visible on cart page for eligible cart total
Preconditions: Cart has product with total eligible for Afterpay; brand has payment messaging enabled
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Open /cart 3. Inspect payment messaging area
Expected Result: Payment messaging (Afterpay or similar) visible and non-empty.
Notes: Skechers disables this — validated in CT-skx-001; Vans shows additional PayPal options — see CT-van-002

Description: Removing an applied coupon reverts cart total to pre-discount amount
Preconditions: Valid coupon already applied to cart
Steps: 1. Open /cart with coupon applied 2. Click Remove coupon
Expected Result: Discount line disappears; cart total reverts to undiscounted amount.

Description: Removing a product from cart fires a dataLayer remove-from-cart event
Preconditions: Analytics tools available; cart has product
Steps: 1. Intercept dataLayer.push 2. Remove product from cart 3. Read captured events
Expected Result: At least one event matching /remove|cart_update|remove_from_cart/i is captured.
Notes: Partial — verifies event fires; payload schema not validated

Description: Dr. Martens cart page uses 'Bag' terminology not 'Cart' or 'Basket'
Preconditions: Dr. Martens project; cart has product
Steps: 1. Open /cart 2. Inspect page heading and primary CTAs
Expected Result: Heading or CTA text matches /bag/i (e.g. 'My Bag'). Does NOT contain standalone word 'cart' or 'basket'.
Notes: Consistent with DRM brand terminology; pairs with MC-drm-001 for mini-cart

Description: Vans cart displays Qantas QFF / PlatyPoints loyalty section
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Open /cart 3. Inspect cart summary area for loyalty messaging
Expected Result: Loyalty section visible and non-empty (mentions Qantas points or PlatyPoints).
Notes: PlatyPointsSummaryFragment is the component; non-members may see an opt-in prompt

Description: Vans cart payment messaging mentions PayPal as a payment option
Preconditions: Vans project; cart has eligible product
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Open /cart 3. Inspect payment messaging
Expected Result: Messaging contains /paypal|pay in 4|braintree/i.
Notes: Vans supports Afterpay + Braintree CC + PayPal + PayPal Pay-in-4

Description: Skechers cart does NOT display Afterpay messaging
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Open /cart 3. Inspect entire cart body
Expected Result: Cart body text does NOT contain /afterpay|after pay|4 payments|installments/i.
Notes: miniCartPaymentMessaging=false for Skechers — same flag as MC-skx-001
